systemStatus.headline: Tue May 26 7 AM run COMPLETE. Mon May 25 Toast = Net $2,074 / Gross $2,226 (sharp Mon drop from Sun's $11,306). Sling Tue 5/26 = 7 emp / 32.91 hrs (healthy). Google Ads + Yelp LIVE scrapes OK. GitHub PAT 200 OK.
systemStatus.detail: (1) Toast: Mon May 25 DPS captured via group-rollup email (arrived 6:15 AM PT; dedicated 229 W Montecito DPS expected ~7:38 AM). Net $2,074.00 / Gross $2,226.00 - SHARP Mon drop from Sun May 24 ($11,306). 53 orders / 95 guests / $21.83 per guest / $39.13 per order, Labor 18.6% (healthy), Discounts 6.8%, 1 void, $0 refunds, 43 card payments. (2) Sling: Tue May 26 daily report arrived 7:01 AM PT - 7 employees / 32.91 hrs / 7 shifts / 0 uncovered / 0 OT / 2 off. Staff: Isael (Cook, 4:59A-4:59A malformed open shift - verify), Tony Rincon (Bar AM), Christine Vargas (Server lunch), Andrew Turner (Bar PM), Augustine Arroyo (Server PM), Noel Nunez (Chef PM), Bri Kelley (Server PM). (3) Google Ads: LIVE scrape OK - May 25 spend $16.74 (-$8.02 vs comparison), 6,939 impr (-1,565), 149 clicks, CTR 2.15%, $0.11 CPC, 0 conversions (-14.00). Conv tag remains UNVERIFIED - top action item. (4) Yelp Ads: LIVE scrape OK - last 30d 52.8k ad impr / 765 page visits / 186 leads. Billing May 1-25 $684.14 spend, $1.09 CPC, $3.84 CPL. (5) TripAdvisor: no email in last 2d. (6) Reviews: Scott A 5-star (4d old, still unanswered) - top reply target. (7) GitHub PAT: 200 OK on read.

toast.source: Toast 'The Brewhouse Santa Barbara Group' DPS for Mon May 25 (arrived Tue May 26 6:15 AM PT, group-rollup email). Dedicated 229 W Montecito DPS not yet emailed at 7 AM run (expected ~7:38 AM); group email contains identical numbers since only one location.
toast.note: Mon May 25 DPS (from group-rollup email arrived Tue 6:15 AM PT): Net $2,074.00 / Gross $2,226.00 - SHARP drop from Sun May 24's huge $11,306 day, also light for a Monday. 53 orders / 95 guests / $39.13 per order / $21.83 per guest. Labor 18.6% (healthy), Discounts 6.8%, 1 void item, $0 refunds. Order Type breakdown: 1 Takeout ($20), 0 Delivery, 0 Dine-In counted in Order Type table (dine-in revenue rolled into overall Breakdown). 43 card payments, 0 open orders, 0 auto-clocked-out. Dedicated 229 W Montecito DPS expected ~7:38 AM PT will refresh in next run.

sling.note: Mon May 25 Sling daily report (arrived Mon 7:02 AM PT) - light Monday with only 1 scheduled employee: Katharine Brown (Bartender) 3:30P-9:30P. Verify this matches plan - looks unusually thin for a Monday.

slingToday.note: Tue May 26 Sling daily report (arrived Tue 7:01 AM PT): 7 employees scheduled, 32.91 hours, 7 shifts, 0 uncovered, 0 OT, 2 employees off. Healthy Tuesday staffing. Note: Isael Salvador Narciso shows 4:59A-4:59A open shift again - verify in Sling.

Billing May 1-25: $684.14 spend (+$89 vs May 1-22 last scrape), $1.09 avg CPC, $3.84 avg CPL. 12mo ad-vs-organic: 869 ads / 785 organic = 1,654 leads (53% ad share, up from 52%).
